summary: Frontend-only testing of bug fixes: VirtualizedList error fix, Opening Hours display, LogBox warnings suppression, and Tab navigation translations. All 5 features verified working correctly through code review and UI testing.

virtualizedlist_fix.details: FlatList replaced with ScrollView in LocationPickerMap.native.tsx (lines 131-148). Uses nestedScrollEnabled and keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' for proper nested scrolling

opening_hours_display.details: formatOpeningHours helper function correctly parses schedule object and displays formatted hours. API returns opening_hours.schedule with days (Monday-Sunday) containing enabled flag and periods array
opening_hours_display.api_test: curl verified business biz_a95598886ae3 returns opening_hours.schedule with Monday-Sunday all enabled 09:00-18:00

tab_translations.details: Tab navigation uses t() function from useTranslation for all tab labels. German translation verified: Startseite, Suche, Aktivitäten, Nachrichten, Profil
tab_translations.test_evidence: UI screenshots show German tabs after language switch

logbox_warnings_suppressed.details: LogBox.ignoreLogs configured in NotificationContext.tsx to suppress: expo-notifications warnings (Expo Go limitation) and VirtualizedLists nesting warning

language_selector.details: Language dropdown at login with English, Deutsch, Ελληνικά options. Switching languages updates all UI text including login form and tab labels
language_selector.test_evidence: Screenshots confirm German UI with 'Willkommen zurück', 'E-Mail', 'Passwort', 'Anmelden'

translation_files_verified.en.json: Contains tabs.home, tabs.search, tabs.activities, tabs.messages, tabs.profile keys
translation_files_verified.de.json: Contains German translations: Startseite, Suche, Aktivitäten, Nachrichten, Profil
translation_files_verified.el.json: Contains Greek translations: Αρχική, Αναζήτηση, Δραστηριότητες, Μηνύματα, Προφίλ

code_review_summary.LocationPickerMap.native.tsx: ScrollView with nestedScrollEnabled correctly replaces FlatList to avoid VirtualizedList nesting warning
code_review_summary.business/[id].tsx: Opening Hours section with formatOpeningHours helper displays schedule data correctly in Basic information card
code_review_summary.(tabs)/_layout.tsx: All 5 tab labels use t() function for i18n support
code_review_summary.NotificationContext.tsx: LogBox.ignoreLogs properly suppresses expo-notifications and VirtualizedLists warnings

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes from this iteration verified: 1) VirtualizedList replaced with ScrollView in LocationPickerMap.native.tsx, 2) Opening Hours displayed on business profile with formatOpeningHours helper, 3) Tab navigation labels translated using i18n t() function, 4) LogBox warnings suppressed for expo-notifications and VirtualizedLists, 5) Language selector at login working with EN/DE/EL options. Business biz_a95598886ae3 (Konkapou) has opening hours set 09:00-18:00 all days.
